title: MarshalledItems
description: Schema for MarshalledItems in Nuix REST API

metadataItems.description: The list of metadata item fields.

localizedMetadataItems.description: The list of localized metadata item fields.

metadataItemDetails.description: The list of metadata item details.

count.description: The total item count.  This may differ from the size of the items list depending on paging settings.

deduplicatedCount.description: The deduplicated item count.  This may differ from the size of the items list depending on paging settings.
